slogan_yambi: Yambi is you and I, toi et moi 😊
support_project_description: Your contribution helps us maintain and improve Yambi. Every donation makes a difference!

monthly_donation_info: Your card will be charged monthly. You can cancel anytime from your account settings.

donation_success: Thank you for your donation! Your support helps us continue improving Yambi.

renew_subscription_description: Activate your business subscription to continue using all Yambi features.
confirm_subscription_message: Are you sure you want to proceed with this subscription?
subscription_info: Your business subscription will be active for 1 month. You can renew before expiration.
subscription_details_info: Your subscription will be active for 1 month from the payment date. After expiration, you'll need to renew to continue adding new sales.
monthly_subscription_info: Your card will be charged $3.99 monthly. You can cancel anytime.
one_time_subscription_info: This is a one-time payment of $3.99. Your subscription will be active for 1 month.
monthly_subscription_details_info: Your card will be charged $3.99 automatically every month. You can cancel anytime from your account settings.
one_time_subscription_details_info: This is a one-time payment of $3.99. Your subscription will be active for 1 month from the payment date. After expiration, you'll need to renew to continue adding new sales.
subscription_duration_1_subtext: Full price for one month of access.
subscription_duration_6_subtext: Pay for 5 months, get 6 — one month included free.
subscription_duration_12_subtext: Pay for 10 months, get 12 — two months included free.
subscription_duration_6_subtext_basic: Full price for 6 months of access.
subscription_duration_12_subtext_basic: Full price for 12 months of access.
one_time_payment_intro: One-time payment only. Pick how long you need — no automatic renewal.
one_time_subscription_details_1m: One-time payment of {amount} USD. Your subscription will be active for 1 month from the payment date. Renew anytime to continue.
one_time_subscription_details_6m: One-time payment of {amount} USD. Your subscription will be active for 6 months (you pay for 5). After that, renew to continue.
one_time_subscription_details_12m: One-time payment of {amount} USD. Your subscription will be active for 12 months (you pay for 10). After that, renew to continue.
one_time_subscription_details_6m_basic: One-time payment of {amount} USD. Your subscription will be active for 6 months. After that, renew to continue.
one_time_subscription_details_12m_basic: One-time payment of {amount} USD. Your subscription will be active for 12 months. After that, renew to continue.
confirm_one_time_info_1m: You will be charged {amount} USD once. Access for 1 month.
confirm_one_time_info_6m: You will be charged {amount} USD once. Access for 6 months (1 month free).
confirm_one_time_info_12m: You will be charged {amount} USD once. Access for 1 year (2 months free).
confirm_one_time_info_6m_basic: You will be charged {amount} USD once. Access for 6 months.
confirm_one_time_info_12m_basic: You will be charged {amount} USD once. Access for 1 year.
choose_subscription_plan: Choose a subscription plan that fits your business needs
subscribe_description: Complete your subscription to activate all plan features.
free_plan_info: The Free plan is automatically applied to all businesses without an active subscription. You can upgrade to a paid plan at any time.
pos_limit_requires_subscription: You've reached the max number of points of sale for your subscription plan. Renew your plan to continue using this point of sale.
max_items_reached: You have reached the maximum number of articles allowed for your current plan.
subscription_successful: Your business subscription has been activated successfully!
subscription_failed_to_save: Payment succeeded but failed to save subscription. Please contact support.
subscription_expired_message: Your business subscription has expired. Please renew to continue adding new sales.

connection_failed: Unable to connect to Internet. Please turn on your mobile data or connect to WI-FI then retry.
phone_code_explanation: We need to verify that you're really the owner of this phone number. Providing us this code shows us that you really have it and that it is working fine.
phone_code_explanation_2: We'll redirect you to Home page once this is done. Just enter the code and all the work will be done in the background.
verification_code: Your Yambi account signin verification code is
account_settings_info: By default, your account is set to public. It means everyone can find you when making a research on Yambi. If you set it to private, someone should first have your contact ID (your username) in order to locate you on Yambi. Your username is
invalid_photo: Error uploading picture. Invalid file type
error_names_length: Names must have at least 3 characters
information_follow: Start following a user means you add him to your contacts. You will now be able to see his posts, daily statuses and send him messages unless he blocks you to one of these options. He has to follow you back before he does the same. You can also block him if you want.
complete_profile: Complete your profile to help your contacts find you well
choose_who_see_post: Choose who can see your post
need_blog_before_post: You need to have at least one blog before you post on Yambi. Choose a blog name and an extension domain to get it done.
extension_domain_explanation: Choose now an extension domain. E.g.: Nature, Architecture, Sciences, Style, etc.
join_pictures: Join pictures to your post (max 4 pictures)
inbox_encrypt_message_1: This is a private and secure chat. Feel free to share content, funny moments, or business information.
inbox_encrypt_message_2: Noone can access the content you share.
group_flag: Choose a flag for the group
no_contacts_word: You don't have any contact yet. Explore contacts to get in touch with people all over the world
no_chats_word: You don't have any chats yet. Explore your Yambi contacts and start a new conversation by clicking the button below.
no_groups_word: Your account isn't part of any groups yet. Explore your contacts to connect with people and discover public groups.
follow_back_text: Follow back people who recently started following you
sent_audio: You sent a voice note to

cannot_set_higher_level: You cannot set a user level higher than your current level.
something_mind: Is there something in your mind ?
phone_required_message: Your account must have a phone number to send a message. Please update your profile.
message_sent_success: Thank you. Your message has been sent.
failed_play_load_audio: Failed loading voice note. Connect to Internet.
email_used: This email or username is already used by another user. Try login if it's yours or choose another one.
wrong_credentials: The email and password given are wrong. Try again later.
success_created_business: The workspace has been created successfully. Start start shopping by first adding items to the store.
no_workspace: We found no workspaces linked to this account. Try creating a business and add items right after the subscription is completed.
stock_quantities_locked_after_sales: This item has sales. Quantities can only be changed using Renew stock or inventory movements.
stock_quantities_editable_before_sales: Until the first sale, you can set store and warehouse quantities here.
renew_stock_description: Move units between the sales floor and the warehouse, or record new stock received.
error_move_exceeds_store: You cannot move more items than are available in the store.
error_move_exceeds_warehouse: You cannot move more items than are available in the warehouse.
error_inventory_item_not_found: This item was not found on the server. Open your business list to sync, then try again.
error_inventory_forbidden: This action is not allowed for this item or account.
error_inventory_server: The server could not save this movement. Please try again later.
error_units_per_bulk: Units per wholesale lot must be at least 1.
renew_stock_select_operation: Select an operation, then tap Finish and Save.
renew_stock_confirm_hint: You are about to save the following movement. Please review it carefully.
no_items: No items linked to this workspace. Tap on 'Add item' to add an item to the store.
no_activity: You're enable to create instances to this business until it has a valid subscription.
information_create_business:
Welcome to the Business Creation Board. Each business can have multiple points of sale. Check the 'Define business as Main point of sale' button to automatically create a sales site after you’ve created your business.

Once you’ve created your business and sales sites, you can add items to them for sales operations. 

Since item prices may vary between different sales sites, remember to add, when available, multiple prices by navigating left or right in the item edit forms.
no_inventory_movements_hint: When you restock or move inventory between the store and warehouse, your activity will show up here.
inventory_profit_chart_hint: Set cost and selling prices on your items, and keep stock quantities updated to see margin analysis.
inventory_margin_negative_hint: Potential revenue is below total purchase cost for this inventory mix.
inventory_movement_filter_no_results: No movements match your search. Try a different article name or ID.
define_as_main_site: Define as main point of sale
fields_error_validation: You must fill all required fields before you continue
invalid_number_error: Please enter only valid numbers for price and quantity fields
impossible_edit: You're unable to edit this information at moment
confirm_mark_paid: Are you sure you want to mark this bill as fully paid?
confirm_add_installment: Are you sure you want to record this installment payment?
delete_item_text: Are you sure you want to delete this article?
admin_text: Owner. Has full access to the business.
salesforce_manager_text: Manages sales and business points of sale. Can add sellers to point of sale.
sale_operator_text: Seller. In charge of adding sales operations
delete_sale_text: Do you really want to delete this sale operation?
delete_sale_nb: Warning! If you delete this sale operation, the quantity will be restored to the selected item and amounts won't be considered anymore.
delete_business_text: Are you sure you want to delete this business?
delete_business_nb: Warning! By proceeding, you will permanently delete all data associated with this business, including your business subscription, points of sale, users, items, and sales.
delete_sales_point_text: Are you sure you want to delete this point of sale?
delete_sales_point_nb: Warning! By proceeding, you will permanently delete all data associated with this point of sale, including users and sales.
use_small_dialog_box_for_sale_operation: Use a small dialog box for new sales operations. This can help streamline your workflow and improve efficiency.
close_sale_frame_after_operation: Close the sales operation window/page after adding a new sale. This is especially useful when adding multiple sales in succession.
redirect_to_invoice_after_new_sales: Redirect to the invoice page after completing a new sale. If you have a printer nearby, this allows you to go directly to the invoice page and print it immediately.
themes_settings_text: Including vibrant, eye-catching colors that are both customized and pre-defined.
customize_settings_text: Customize business, expenses, and application tabs.
message_us_settings_text: Please leave us a suggestion to make Yambi an even better experience.
this_affect_local: This only affects the preferences of your local account. If there is any other accounts synced with it, rest assured, their data remain secure and unchanged.
customize_business_settings_text: Customize the actions in the Business tab to suit your needs.
customize_expenses_settings_text: Customize the actions in the Expenses tab to suit your needs.
require_password_business: Require a password to view data in the Business tab.
set_business_password: Set a password for your Business tab.
no_sales_available: There are currently no sales available. Please add items and start selling.
name: Name
delete_company_user_confirmation: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the company? The member will be moved to past members and can be restored later.
user_add_sale_error: You cannot add a new sale while your business activity status is set to inactive. Please contact the manager to activate your account and resume selling.
business_level_error: You are unable to make changes at this time. Your business activity may be set to inactive, or your access level does not permit changes to this content. Please contact the manager for assistance.
update_profile_information_text: Update your profile information to make sure your contacts has latest updates about you.
caption: Caption
member_exists: Member already exists in this company
active_subscription_to_sell: An active subscription is required to access selling features.
subscription_renewal_price_message: The subscription fee for stock management features for your business is $10 USD. This is a scalable all-in-one tool designed to help you stay on top of every aspect of your business: from registering items to selling them, including inventory management, user management, and sales statistics analysis.
subscription_warning_message: Your subscription will end in {days} days. Please renew to continue using Yambi business.
subscription_expired_warning_message: Your subscription has expired. Please renew to continue using Yambi business.
unable_delete_sole_owner: It is not possible to delete or block the sole owner of the business. To proceed, you must first assign another owner.
tags_info_description: You will receive information from the main tag and any additional tags you select
signout_text: By signing out, your account will be temporarely disconnected. Hit 'Confirm' to continue.
delete_account_warning: Do you really want to delete your account ? You'll lose all the data associated to your account. Hit 'Confirm' to continue.
need_access_welcome_message: Yambi needs access to your contacts to help you find people from your phonebook who are already using the app. The names and phone numbers from your contacts may be securely sent to our servers in order to identify Yambi users you may know. This data is only used for this feature and is not shared with third parties. By tapping “Accept and Close”, you agree to this collection and processing of data.

enter_company_tags_info: You must enter the company tags to help the algorithm identify the right news for you.

no_stories_text: No stories from your contacts at the moment. Tap the '+' icon to add your own and share it with them.
onboarding_desc_1: Connect with friends and family through secure, real-time messaging
onboarding_desc_2: Track sales, manage inventory, and grow your business all in one place
onboarding_desc_3: Share stories, send media, and communicate seamlessly with end-to-end encryption

publish_to_marketplace_description: To publish to marketplace, you need to have an item picture, a selling price, items in store, and a category and subcategory.

expenses_description: Start entering your daily expenses to track your routine and manage your wallet effectively. Stay on top of your spending habits and make better financial decisions.
expense_reminder_body: Remember to enter your daily expenses to keep track of your spending.

low_stock_reminder_intro: Do not forget to restock these items:
no_sales_midday_reminder_body: The day has started and no sales have been recorded yet. Don't forget to record your sales.
weekend_expenses_reminder_body: It is the weekend. Don't forget to record your expenses to properly track your daily spending.
no_expenses: No expenses in this category yet
add_first_expense: Tap the button above to add your first expense
